elements.original_description: A minimalist illustration of a clock with a long arrow pointing far into the future, symbolizing the distant feeling of retirement. The background is pure white.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a clock with a single long arrow extended to point far into the future, clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast with no shading or gradients, evoking a distant and far-away mood.
